library_preparation_preflight.summary: io.circe:circe-generic_3:0.14.12 is a small Scala 3 generic derivation module; its runtime/compile dependencies are resolved transitively and it does not require external services, Docker, environment variables, or system properties for meaningful tests.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: No environment or system-property setup is needed. Meaningful coverage should use the Scala 3 scaffold and exercise circe-generic itself via io.circe.generic.semiauto.deriveEncoder/deriveDecoder/deriveCodec and/or io.circe.generic.auto for case classes and sealed traits. Construct or compare io.circe.Json values directly through circe-core APIs; do not add circe-parser unless a test specifically needs string parsing.
risks: The artifact contains mostly inline Scala 3 derivation helpers, so tests that only exercise circe-core Json construction/printing will not meaningfully cover circe-generic.

Older Circe documentation mentions @JsonCodec, but the Scala 3 circe-generic_3 0.14.12 artifact exposes auto and semiauto derivation classes only; tests should avoid relying on unavailable annotation-macro APIs.
